docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,900.00 FILED BY HAVERKAMP, KATRINA AS TO DEFENDANT CHUA, BELINDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-16-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-16-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-16-2022 BY WILLIAM LYNN. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-16-2022 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JAN-09-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFFS HARRY DRAKE, RAHUL MISRA, JORDAN MANTHEY, MATT KEHAN, JAKE PIGOTT ARE PRESENT BY ZOOM. DEFENDANT AMY MCDOUGALL IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICES ON DEFENDANTS CLAIM ARE INVALID. SECTION 4B IS NOT CORRECTLY FILLED OUT. SERVICE ON "RECEPTION" IS NOT A VALID FORM OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFFS DO NOT WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. PLAINTIFF'S STATE THAT THE ADDRESS INFORMATION LISTED ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS THE CORRECT INFORMATION FOR SERVICE. DEFENDANT'S CLAIM IS TO BE PROPERLY SERVED ON ALL PLAINTIFFS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-16-2022 - JUDGMENT. (PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON 11-16-22)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAVERKAMP, KATRINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHUA, BELINDA $3,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,865.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
